title: .NET Backend Developer Intern
description: Bluesense is a cutting-edge AI company specializing in artificial intelligence, computer vision, and machine learning. We build AI-driven products and provide AI integration and consultancy services, transforming data science and deep learning into practical solutions for real-world problems. Our work connects with innovation ecosystems and product initiatives such as a Smart Beauty App, aligned with communities like Harvard Innovation Labs (Harvard University) and ITU ARI Teknokent / ARI Çekirdek. This is a full-time remote, unpaid compulsory internship role for a .NET Backend Developer at Bluesense. The intern will contribute to real product development by building and improving backend services using C# and ASP.NET Core, focusing on clean architecture, reliable APIs, and scalable system design. You’ll work on: Building and maintaining RESTful APIs for production-style applications Designing and implementing backend services, business logic, and data workflows Working with databases and optimizing data access layers Ensuring system reliability, performance, and security best practices Collaborating with a remote team through task tracking, code reviews, and iterative delivery Develop backend features using C# and ASP.NET Core based on product requirements and system designs Design and implement RESTful APIs (controllers, services, DTOs, request/response models) Work with databases (SQL Server / PostgreSQL) including schema design, queries, and optimization Apply OOP principles and clean architecture practices (layered architecture, separation of concerns, SOLID basics) Implement authentication and authorization mechanisms (JWT, role-based access control basics) Handle error management, logging, and validation to ensure robust and predictable APIs Improve backend quality through: Debugging and fixing issues Refactoring for readability, scalability, and maintainability Basic performance improvements (query optimization, caching awareness) Work in a remote workflow: Use Git (branches, commits, pull requests) Participate in code reviews Communicate progress clearly and deliver tasks incrementally Solid knowledge of C# and .NET / ASP.NET Core Understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (encapsulation, inheritance, polymorphism, SOLID basics) Familiarity with REST API design principles Basic knowledge of databases and SQL Strong problem-solving mindset: able to investigate backend issues and debug systematically Comfortable working independently in a remote environment (time management, clear updates) Developed backend features using C# and ASP.NET Core , building RESTful APIs based on product requirements Designed and implemented service-layer architecture following clean architecture principles Built and maintained REST APIs , including request validation, business logic, and structured responses Worked with SQL databases , writing queries and improving data access efficiency Implemented authentication/authorization flows (e.g., JWT-based systems) Improved system reliability through debugging, refactoring, and performance optimizations Collaborated in a remote team workflow using Git, pull requests, and code review feedback Documented API behavior and backend logic to support team collaboration and maintainability Tech: C#, .NET Core, ASP.NET Core, REST APIs, SQL Server/PostgreSQL, Entity Framework Core, OOP, Clean Architecture, Git 📌 Note: This is a compulsory internship and is unpaid. 📩 To apply: Send CV + GitHub/portfolio + backend project examples to taner@bluesense.ai or DM.

title: Mid-Level Full Stack Developer (Java + React)
description: We are looking for a Mid-Level Full Stack Developer to join our team. The ideal candidate should have strong backend development skills and experience with modern frontend technologies. ## Requirements ### Backend * 3+ years of experience with Java and Spring Boot * Experience designing and developing RESTful APIs * Strong knowledge of MySQL * Experience with message brokers such as RabbitMQ * Familiarity with microservices architecture * Understanding of software design principles and clean code practices ### Frontend * Experience with React * Good knowledge of JavaScript and/or TypeScript * Understanding of HTML5, CSS3, and responsive design ### Nice to Have * Experience with Docker * Familiarity with Redis * Experience with CI/CD pipelines * Understanding of Agile/Scrum methodologies ### What We Expect * Strong problem-solving skills * Ability to work independently and collaboratively * Good communication skills * Passion for building scalable and maintainable software

title: Senior Full Stack Mobile Developer / Co-Founder
description: Our partner company is looking for a skilled, experienced, visionary and entrepreneurial Full Stack Mobile Developer as a Co-Founder to own end-to-end all technical processes and development such as Mobile, Backend, Frontend, Web, PC, AI, Cloud, etc This is a Startup Co-Founder role. Compensation will only be based on Profit Share and Stock Option (Vesting). If you are excited to start your own business, this is the perfect opportunity for you! About us: Co-Founders having 15+ years of tech experience providing funds Requirements : 7+ years of experience in Development having 4+ years in Mobile development Graduated from relevant University departments Full Stack experience including React Native, Flutter, Python, Java etc and all required and related Tech Stack Proven track record of developing high income generating iOS, Android, AI apps Hands on experience with AI, API, SDK, Analytics, DB, Cloud, Web, Server, Tool processes, development and integrations Proven end-to-end ownership of all technical processes and development Rapid and high quality prototyping, iterations and liveops Deep expertise with readable, reusable, improvable development and coding Solid experience with Mobile performance: rendering, memory, battery, network usage minimization and optimization Strong understanding of Product, Design, UI/UX, A/B Testing, Marketing and Monetization processes Keeping up and ahead of current trends and industry Having great portfolio and references A creative and hacker mindset with a strong sense of ownership Using AI, AI apps and tools to get ahead of competition For male candidates, having completed military service or having a permanent exemption What We Offer: Being a Co-Founder Future CTO Remote / Hybrid Working Flexible Hours Profit Share Stock Option Great Team Funding

title: .NET Backend Developer Intern (C# / ASP.NET Core) - Compulsory Internship
description: .NET Backend Developer Intern (C# / ASP.NET Core) - Compulsory Internship Bluesense is a cutting-edge AI company specializing in artificial intelligence, computer vision, and machine learning. We build AI-driven products and provide AI integration and consultancy services, transforming data science and deep learning into practical solutions for real-world problems. Our work connects with innovation ecosystems and product initiatives such as a Smart Beauty App, aligned with communities like Harvard Innovation Labs (Harvard University) and ITU ARI Teknokent / ARI Çekirdek. ⸻ Role This is a full-time remote, unpaid compulsory internship role for a .NET Backend Developer at Bluesense. The intern will contribute to real product development by building and improving backend services using C# and ASP.NET Core, focusing on clean architecture, reliable APIs, and scalable system design. You’ll work on: * Building and maintaining RESTful APIs for production-style applications * Designing and implementing backend services, business logic, and data workflows * Working with databases and optimizing data access layers * Ensuring system reliability, performance, and security best practices * Collaborating with a remote team through task tracking, code reviews, and iterative delivery ⸻ What you will do * Develop backend features using C# and ASP.NET Core based on product requirements and system designs * Design and implement RESTful APIs (controllers, services, DTOs, request/response models) * Work with databases (SQL Server / PostgreSQL) including schema design, queries, and optimization * Apply OOP principles and clean architecture practices (layered architecture, separation of concerns, SOLID basics) * Implement authentication and authorization mechanisms (JWT, role-based access control basics) * Handle error management, logging, and validation to ensure robust and predictable APIs * Improve backend quality through: * Debugging and fixing issues * Refactoring for readability, scalability, and maintainability * Basic performance improvements (query optimization, caching awareness) * Work in a remote workflow: * Use Git (branches, commits, pull requests) * Participate in code reviews * Communicate progress clearly and deliver tasks incrementally ⸻ Required * Solid knowledge of C# and .NET / ASP.NET Core * Understanding of Object-Oriented Programming (encapsulation, inheritance, polymorphism, SOLID basics) * Familiarity with REST API design principles * Basic knowledge of databases and SQL * Strong problem-solving mindset: able to investigate backend issues and debug systematically * Comfortable working independently in a remote environment (time management, clear updates) ⸻ .NET Backend Developer Intern (C# / ASP.NET Core) - Compulsory Internship (Unpaid) | Remote * Developed backend features using C# and ASP.NET Core, building RESTful APIs based on product requirements * Designed and implemented service-layer architecture following clean architecture principles * Built and maintained REST APIs, including request validation, business logic, and structured responses * Worked with SQL databases, writing queries and improving data access efficiency * Implemented authentication/authorization flows (e.g., JWT-based systems) * Improved system reliability through debugging, refactoring, and performance optimizations * Collaborated in a remote team workflow using Git, pull requests, and code review feedback * Documented API behavior and backend logic to support team collaboration and maintainability Tech: C#, .NET Core, ASP.NET Core, REST APIs, SQL Server/PostgreSQL, Entity Framework Core, OOP, Clean Architecture, Git

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: Sensor Tower’s digital intelligence platform provides unparalleled insight into market trends, advertising, competitor’s strategies, and consumer/user audience across mobile, web, and gaming. Sensor Tower’s insights are trusted by more than 2,500 enterprises worldwide across tech, retail/commerce, entertainment/media, gaming, consumer packaged goods, finance, and investment. About this role: We're looking for a Full Stack Developer (main back end focus) to work on our advertising analytics platform. We gather and process BIG amounts of data and deliver meaningful insights to our customers. We have browser extensions, databases, panelists, servers, so many servers, and a great hybrid culture with coworkers locally and across the globe. There's a good mix of extremely difficult problems, impossible problems, easy problems, bugs, performance issues, and the occasional thing that's a joy to work on – join us! What you will do in a typical day: Tackle interesting performance and scalability challenges. Meticulously refactor bunches of reports decimating code size and run time while preserving results. Intelligently manage tech debt while simultaneously delivering new features for the business. Code in SQL and C# (and occasionally js) in a mixed environment (Windows and Linux but mostly Windows) utilizing AWS, SQL Server, Redshift, Mongo, EntityFramework and ASP.NET Core. Participate in a Kanban/Devops dev process with fluid requirements, weekly scrums, and potentially be on-call w/Pagerduty Be a proponent for continuous improvement, architecture, clean code, and good systems design We use Github for source control and Jira for project management We review PRs! (usually) and ship often. What you can bring: Experienced C# developer. Be able to code in C#, SQL and occasionally in Ruby. Big Plus: Comfortable reading and modifying Javascript/React. Friendly - You will be working in cross function with a lot of cool people! Love for data - Our platform provides data intelligence for the digital economy! Our Engineering Culture We believe that "Simplicity is a prerequisite for reliability." We are looking for engineers who align with our core values: Simplicity: We avoid over-engineering. We prefer the tools we already have and the most straightforward solutions over "shiny new toys." Quality: We write code that is a pleasure to read because we know code is written once but read many times. We don't cut corners, and we polish to a high level before shipping. Extreme Ownership: We don't just do the minimum. We expect you to understand the "why" behind your work and own the ultimate goal of fixing problems at their root cause, avoiding temporary band-aids. Prioritization: We focus relentlessly on what is important, not just what is urgent. Read more about some of our Technical challenges here (written by members of our engineering team): https://sensortower.com/blog/speeding-up-the-backend-with-graph-theory https://sensortower.com/blog/how-we-scaled-to-thousands-of-sidekiq-workers Fraud warning: It's common for scammers to create positions that look legitimate on other sites. To ensure your submission is considered, only apply for positions at Sensor Tower through our company website or through posts directly associated with Sensor Tower company profiles on sites such as LinkedIn, Indeed, BuiltIn or Hackajob. At no point will Sensor Tower ever ask for money, credit card, or bank account information to complete a job application. Communications received from Sensor Tower are only sent by e-mail addresses ending in sensortower.com. All Sensor Tower interviews will be conducted via phone or Zoom. At no time will a conversation be moved to an alternative email outside of sensortower.com or text. Should an issue arise that you feel we should be aware of, please contact us. Please provide your resume when applying. To all recruitment agencies: Sensor Tower does not accept third party resumes. Please do not send resumes to our jobs alias, Sensor Tower employees or any other organization location. Sensor Tower is not responsible for any fees related to unsolicited resumes. Sensor Tower will not pay any third-party agency or company that does not have a signed agreement with Sensor Tower. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Backend / Data Engineer(Python)
description: Company Canaria is a technology startup providing high-quality, large-scale labor market data to the B2B market. Our mission is to power the next generation of solutions in recruitment, HR analytics, workforce planning, lead generation, healthcare, academic research, and finance by delivering the most comprehensive and accurate job market data available. Our advanced data mining, computing optimizations, and state-of-the-art NLP techniques let us process job market data at scale: over 1 billion unique job postings drawn from 200,000+ data sources, with 100+ fields per record. Our clients use this data to understand market trends, identify skill gaps, and connect people with the right opportunities. What You Will Do Own the design and implementation of robust data pipelines that form the backbone of our product. Design and operate the databases behind that product, across relational and non-relational models. Build and deploy scalable, cloud-native and serverless services on our cloud platform. Use containerization (Docker, and Kubernetes where it fits) to streamline deployment and operations. Ensure system quality through stress, integration, and end-to-end testing. Write clean, maintainable, well-documented code. Collaborate with engineers, data scientists, and product managers. Who You Are (Required) 3+ years building production backend or data-intensive systems. Bachelor's in Computer Science, Engineering, or equivalent practical experience. Highly proficient in Python and comfortable in a Unix environment (scripting and application development). Solid experience with at least one relational database (e.g. PostgreSQL) and at least one NoSQL store (e.g. MongoDB or Redis). Hands-on experience with at least one major cloud platform (AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure). Comfortable containerizing and deploying applications with Docker. Nice to Have Experience designing scalable back-end systems for data-intensive workloads. Kubernetes in production. Aerospike or other high-throughput key-value stores. RESTful API design and optimization. CI/CD pipelines and automated testing frameworks. Monitoring and logging tools (e.g. Prometheus, Grafana). Big data warehouses (BigQuery, Redshift). Asynchronous programming in Python. Web scraping (Scrapy) and browser automation (Playwright). Benefits High-end laptop. Annual performance bonus. Work with global teams (US, EU). Founders and colleagues with FAANG and top-institution backgrounds. Access to powerful on-prem and cloud compute for research. Professional development and growth opportunities. Hiring Process First call about the role & expectations (15 mins) Basic Python coding interview (1 hour) Technical interview (1 hour)

title: BackEnd Developer
description: Company Description Welcome to MeeApps! Founded in 2013, MeeApps is a reputable technology company in the financial sector, known for its innovative and reliable services. We partner with leading brokerage houses and portfolio management firms in Turkey, providing cutting-edge technology solutions to enhance financial operations and services. Role Description This full-time role at MeeApps in Istanbul, Türkiye involves day-to-day tasks focused on leveraging technology to transform financial services and customer experiences. It is an on-site position where you will contribute to revolutionizing the financial service landscape through innovative solutions. You'll be responsible by taking part of all the phases of one of our core backend services including development, maintanence and testing. Mandatory Qualifications At least 2 years of experience on backend development with Golang Experience working with Grpc , Rest API and/or Websockets Experience with Postgresql and/or with other relational database systems Experience working with Linux systems Strong analytical skills and problem-solving abilities Excellent communication and teamwork skills Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, or related fields Preferred (Not Mandatory) Experience with Mqtt is a big plus but not mandatory Proficiency in software development in financial technology especially in BIST Experience with brokerage houses and their operations are big plus. Experience with working on any kind of accounting project is a very big plus. What We Offer • Professional Growth : Work with experienced professionals in the financial technology sector and gain hands-on experience with cutting-edge tools and technologies. • Innovative & Collaborative Work Environment : Join a team that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning in a dynamic, fast-paced setting. • Impactful Work : Be a part of a company that is transforming financial services through technology, working on high-performance backend systems used by top financial institutions. • Work-Life Balance : Enjoy a supportive workplace culture that prioritizes work-life balance while encouraging personal and professional growth.

title: Yazılım Geliştirme Uzmanı / Backend
description: İnnova Bilişim Çözümleri A.Ş, farklı teknolojilerde bilgi birikimine sahip 1300'ün üzerindeki profesyonel kadrosu ile Türkiye’nin önde gelen bilişim çözümleri firmasıdır. 1999’dan bugüne telekomünikasyon, finans, üretim, kamu ve hizmet sektörleri başta olmak üzere her sektördeki kuruluşlara platform bağımsız çözümler sunan İnnova, uluslararası standartlarda ürettiği çözümleri şimdiye kadar 4 kıtada 37 ülkeye ihraç etmeyi başarmıştır. 2007 yılından bu yana Türk Telekom Grubu Şirketleri bünyesinde yer alan İnnova Bilişim Çözümleri A.Ş, İstanbul ve Ankara ana ofislerinin yanı sıra Türkiye'nin çeşitli bölgelerine yayılmış 14 ofisi üzerinden faaliyetlerine devam etmektedir. Genel Nitelikler Telekominikasyon sektorinde mobil Ağ Planlama ve Optimizasyon platformunda görev alacak; yoğun matematiksel/istatistiksel algoritmaları, uluslararası telekomünikasyon standartlarını (ITU-R) ve coğrafi veri katmanlarını performanslı backend servislerine dönüştürebilecek Backend Geliştirici arıyoruz. Teknik Özellikler • Eğitim: Üniversitelerin Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği, Matematik Mühendisliği veya ilgili bölümlerinden mezun. • Deneyim: Tercihen Telekomünikasyon veya CBS/GIS projelerinde çalışmış • Programlama Dilleri: Java, Python ve/veya Go (Golang) dillerine ileri düzeyde hakim. • Matematiksel Hesaplama: ITU standartlarındaki karmaşık formülleri, integral ve matris hesaplamalarını koda dökecek düzeyde NumPy, SciPy ve Pandas kütüphanelerinde tecrübeli. • Coğrafi Bilgi Sistemleri (GIS): Sayısal Yükseklik Modelleri (DEM, SRTM) ve arazi profili analizi süreçlerine hakim; PostGIS, GDAL, GeoPandas teknolojilerinde deneyimli. • Veritabanı & Mimari: PostgreSQL ve Redis (Önbellekleme) mimarilerine hakim; RESTful API ve gRPC tabanlı mikro-servis mimarileri kurmuş. • Bulut Teknolojileri: CI/CD süreçlerine hakim, Openshift ve Kubernetes teknolojilerinde çalışmış, Gitlab/argoCD/Jenkins/Swagger/bitbucket hakkında bilgi sahibi. Kafka,rabbitmq gibi q message yapıları hakkında bilgi sahib i. Sorumluluklar • Büyük veri setlerinin ve coğrafi koordinat verileri ile geliştirmek ve sunucu tarafında en performanslı şekilde işlenmesini sağlamak. • Uygulama veritabını, appkatmanı ve UI elementleri çalışmak.
